rules.rule_text:
rule iOSPegasusDetected
{
	strings:
		$a01 = "/private/var/root/test.app/data"
		$a02 = "/private/var/root/test.app/d/"
		$a03 = "/private/var/root/test.app"
		$a04 = "/private/var/tmp/crw"
		$a05 = "/private/var/tmp/cr"
		$a06 = "/private/var/tmp/st_data/"

	condition:
		any of them
}
